identifier.description: Raw identifier: ANI/phone (E.164 or national), email, or account number. Normalized server-side, so an unencoded '+' is tolerated.

found.description: False when the identifier resolves to no subscriber.

party_id.description: Internal subscriber id. Never read it aloud.

healthy.description: True when no fault is detected. Use this to confirm the fix worked.

fault_type.description: The remaining fault, or none when healthy.

wan_ok.description: True when the broadband line into the home is healthy.

wan_status.description: Line state: online, degraded or offline.

gateway_model.description: Model name of the customer's router/hub.

gateway_uptime_s.description: Seconds since the router last restarted.

ap_total.description: How many access points (hub plus boosters) are in the home.

ap_online.description: How many of those are currently online.

extender_status.description: Health of the booster: online, flapping, offline, or none.

device_total.description: How many devices are connected in the home.

devices_on_target_band.description: How many devices are on the faster 5GHz band.

worst_device_label.description: Human name of the device with the weakest signal.

worst_device_band.description: Band of the weakest device: 2.4 or 5.

worst_device_rssi.description: Signal of the weakest device in dBm; below -70 is poor.
